Cardboard Collection & Recycling for Businesses in Bolton

Fast, reliable, and professional cardboard waste management for warehouses, factories, and retail stores across Greater Manchester.

Call Now: 07878 895907 Get a Quote

How It Works

Simple 3-step process to handle your business waste

1

Contact Us

Call us or fill out our online form to request a one-off or regular collection.

2

Collection

Our professional team arrives at your site in Bolton to collect your bulk cardboard waste.

3

Recycling

We process and recycle your cardboard efficiently, supporting your business's green goals.

Why Choose Prime Recycling?

  • Local & Reliable

    Based in Bolton, we provide prompt service across the North West.

  • Fast Response

    We understand business needs and offer rapid collection turnaround.

  • Competitive Pricing

    Professional service at rates that make sense for your bottom line.

About Us

PRIME RECYCLING GROUP LIMITED is a dedicated commercial waste solution provider. We specialise in helping businesses in Bolton and surrounding areas manage their cardboard waste sustainably and efficiently.

From small retail shops to large-scale warehouses, we provide tailored solutions that ensure your waste is handled professionally and recycled properly.

Our Services

Tailored recycling solutions for every business

Cardboard Collection

Regular or one-off collections of all types of business cardboard waste.

Bulk Recycling

Specialised solutions for large volumes of cardboard from warehouses and factories.

Commercial Solutions

Complete waste management consultancy for commercial properties.

Flexible Schedule

We work around your business hours to ensure minimal disruption.

Contact Us

Get in touch today for a free quote or to arrange a collection.
